metadata.description: Outputs UV texture coordinates from mesh UV layers

summary: UV Map node outputs UV coordinates for texture mapping. Unity has built-in UV node with support for multiple UV channels via material properties.
unity_equivalent: Shader Graph UV Node + Vector4 Properties
implementation_notes: For single UV map, use built-in UV node. For multiple UV channels, create Vector4 properties and pass UV coordinates via C# script.
approximation: Direct mapping for primary UV. Multiple UV sets require custom properties.

blender_parameters.name: uv_layer
blender_parameters.description: Select which UV map to use (UV0, UV1, UV2, etc.)

step_1.name: Primary UV Mapping
step_1.description: Use built-in UV node for primary UV channel

step_2.name: Multi-UV Handling
step_2.description: Create Vector4 properties for additional UV channels

blender_to_unity_mapping.notes: Primary UV maps directly. Secondary UV maps require custom implementation.

build_instructions.action: Option 2: Use Unity's built-in UV node

limitations: Multiple UV channels require custom C# script to pass UV data

unity_recreation.description: Use UV node for primary UV. Create Vector4 properties for additional UV channels.
